overview: OMEGA SECURITY is a visually stunning, futuristic AI security command dashboard with a fantasy cover art / cyber-futurism aesthetic. Features dramatic boot sequence, glowing female AI face, seven animated defense panels, live threat feed, cinematic OMEGA ENGAGED mode, and a threat simulation sandbox.
features: Live multi-user threat feed with mock agent labels and auto-refreshing events
Full-screen cinematic OMEGA ENGAGED mode with giant AI face and swirling particles
Threat Simulation Sandbox with LOW/MED/HIGH/CRITICAL escalation buttons and RESET
Seven animated defense panels: Firewall, Threat Detection, Mirror Decoy, Command Hierarchy, Auto-Defend, NNN Protocol, King's Eye
Dramatic boot sequence with scan lines and glitch text
Live animated status bar with threat counter, uptime, and active shields
Zero-Trust visualizer, Quantum Encryption spinner, Behavioral Anomaly chart
